title: Items
subtitle: Your catalogue.
no_items_hint: Create your first catalogue entry to get started.
no_archived_hint: Items you archive from the detail page will appear here.
row_count: {count, plural, =0 {No items} one {# item} other {# items}} loaded

access_denied.title: No access
access_denied.body: You do not have permission to view items in this organization. Ask an admin to grant you items:read or higher.

bulk.confirm_body: This action cannot be undone. Archived rows will be removed from the database.
bulk.partial_failure: Some items could not be updated. Refresh and try again.

delete_confirm.title: Delete permanently?
delete_confirm.body: This will permanently remove "{name}" from your catalogue. This action cannot be undone.

import_modal.title: Import from Excel
import_modal.intro: Upload an .xlsx file. The first row must be a header row. A ''name'' column is required; ''internal_code'', ''unit'', and ''base_price'' are matched automatically. Every other column is matched to an existing field definition by key or label.
import_modal.dropzone_label: Drop an .xlsx file here or click to browse
import_modal.result_unmapped_hint: Create these fields on the Fields tab, then re-upload to include their values.

errors.file_invalid: The uploaded file is not a valid .xlsx workbook.
errors.missing_name_column: The file must have a ''name'' column.
